mapper.select: SELECT s.STD_USER_ID AS studentId, m.USER_NAME AS studentName, s.ENRL_SCHL_NM AS enrlSchlNm, cl.CLASS_SN AS classSn, cl.CLASS_NM AS classroomName, instr_m.USER_NAME AS instructorName, TO_CHAR(cm.REG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS enrollStartDate, ( SELECT ROUND( COUNT(CASE WHEN TRIM(a.ATND_TYPE_CD) != '02' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) ) FROM STUDENT_ATTENDANCE a WHERE a.STD_USER_ID = s.STD_USER_ID AND a.ATND_REG_DT >= SYSDATE - 30 ) AS attendanceRate, ( SELECT ROUND( COUNT(asub.ASGMT_SN) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(ab.ASGMT_SN), 0) ) FROM ASSIGNMENT_BOARD ab LEFT JOIN ASSIGNMENT_SUBMIT asub ON ab.ASGMT_SN = asub.ASGMT_SN AND asub.SBMT_USER_ID = s.STD_USER_ID WHERE ab.CLASS_SN = cl.CLASS_SN ) AS assignmentRate, ( SELECT ROUND(AVG(et.TOT_SCORE), 1) FROM EXAM_TAKER et JOIN EXAM e ON et.EXAM_SN = e.EXAM_SN WHERE et.STD_USER_ID = s.STD_USER_ID AND e.CLASS_SN = cl.CLASS_SN AND et.TOT_SCORE IS NOT NULL ) AS recentExamAvgScore FROM STUDENT s JOIN MEMBER m ON s.STD_USER_ID = m.USER_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cm2.USER_ID, cm2.CLASS_SN, cm2.REG_DT, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY cm2.USER_ID ORDER BY cm2.REG_DT DESC) AS rn FROM CLASSROOM_MEMBER cm2 WHERE cm2.ENRL_STAT_CD = 'ENROLLED' ) cm ON cm.USER_ID = s.STD_USER_ID AND cm.rn = 1 LEFT JOIN CLASSROOM cl ON cm.CLASS_SN = cl.CLASS_SN LEFT JOIN COURSE c ON cl.COURSE_SN = c.COURSE_SN LEFT JOIN MEMBER instr_m ON c.INSTR_USER_ID = instr_m.USER_ID WHERE s.PRNT_USER_ID = #{parentId} ORDER BY m.USER_NAME
